title: Long breadcrumbs crush the header search on resource pages

fix.searchFloor: client/src/components/layout/new/AppHeader.tsx — search trigger wrapper gains md:min-w-[200px] so the breadcrumb (which truncates gracefully) absorbs flex shrink instead of the search
fix.breadcrumbFloor: Breadcrumb nav gains md:min-w-[160px] — with the search floor in place the unbounded-basis nav absorbed ALL shrink and clipped to 0px at md, hiding even the Home › … collapse
fix.ellipsisBreakpoint: run17 BUG-023 middle-crumb ellipsis collapse extended from lg to xl — at exactly 1024px the full trail returned as 6-11px slivers; it only genuinely fits from 1280px up

evidence.probePage: /resource/186111 (longest breadcrumb chain: Encoding & Codecs › General Tools › Build Scripts & Automation › 190-char title)
evidence.acceptance: search input keeps >=160px usable width at 1440/768/375 — PASS (200/200/195); no horizontal overflow; no crumb slivers <14px at any tested width
